faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Our Audio Extractor

items.question: What is an Audio Extractor and how does it work?
items.answer: An Audio Extractor is a specialized tool that separates and extracts the sound track from a video file. Our AI-powered audio extractor uses advanced algorithms to extract high-quality sound while preserving all original sound characteristics. Simply upload your video, and our system will extract the voice for you to download.

items.question: Which video formats can I use to extract sound?
items.answer: Our audio extractor tool supports extracting sound from video formats including MP4, MOV, AVI, WMV, FLV, and more. You can extract sound from virtually any standard video file format with our versatile AI extraction technology.

items.question: What music format will I get after extracting music from video?
items.answer: When you extract audio from video, you'll receive the extracted music in high-quality MP3 format. This format provides excellent sound quality while maintaining a reasonable file size after extraction. The MP3 music format is compatible with almost all devices and media players.

items.question: Is there a file size limit when extracting music from video?
items.answer: Yes, our free audio extractor allows you to extract audio from video up to 10MB in size. For extracting sound from larger video files, you can upgrade to our premium sound extraction service which supports extracting sound from video up to 500MB.

items.question: How can I use the music extracted from video?
items.answer: After extracting music from video, you can use the extracted music for various purposes such as creating podcasts, adding background music to presentations, music production, language learning materials, or any project that requires music extracted from video sources. Our audio extractor makes it easy to get the music you need.
